title: Narrative Legos
creator: Ken Levine
description: Ken Levine proposes reusable narrative elements driven by characters’ passions, relationships, and changing states. The talk sketches an alternative to fixed branching plots for replayable story systems.
useful: It is a clear, debatable design proposal that helps teams discuss what systemic narrative would actually require.
audience: Narrative and systems designers exploring replayable character-driven stories.
learning: Describe a state-driven alternative to branching plots
Connect character relationships to systemic change
Identify production questions left open by a design concept
